[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0100100000 2
2 0000100001 2
3 0000111100 4
4 0010110000 3
5 0101000110 4
6 1001011111 7
7 0111011110 7

01 10 0000111111 6
12 21 1010111000 5
23 32 1111100110 7
34 43 1101011111 8
45 54 1111011111 9
56 65 0111011110 7 match 7
67 76 1101110101 7
70 07 1100110111 7

02 20 1010100111 6
13 31 0101111110 7
24 42 1011111111 9
35 53 0111011110 7 match 7
46 64 1001011111 7 match 6
57 75 1111111111 a
60 06 0001100111 5
71 17 1100111101 7

03 30 0101100111 6
14 41 1001111111 8
25 52 1111111110 9
36 63 0101000110 4 match 5
47 74 1101111111 9
50 05 0111111111 9
61 16 0001111100 5
72 27 1110110101 7

15 51 0111111110 8
26 62 1011100100 5
37 73 1101110111 8
